name: karaadi
description: Fullstack marketplace website using Next.js and Express with Tailwind CSS

scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.install: cd backend && npm i && cd .. && cd frontend && npm i
scripts.dev: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend; DOTENV_CONFIG_DEBUG=false DOTENV_SILENT=true concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.production: pm2 start backend/src/server.ts --name backend --interpreter npx -- tsx && pm2 start npm --name frontend -- run start --prefix frontend
